title: Digital Enterprise | Siemens
body: Adapt to lead the future as a Digital Enterprise Become a Digital Enterprise, faster with Siemens Xcelerator. Combine the real and digital worlds to unlock the full power of data and AI and seamlessly integrate and digitalize the entire product and production lifecycles, including supply chain for better, faster, more profitable outcomes. Contact us Accelerate your digital transformation Key technologies like Industrial AI, comprehensive Digital Twin and Software-Defined Systems help to become a Digital Enterprise. Connecting these technologies with Digital Threads and a seamless data flow allows companies to continuously optimize product development and operations based on data. This creates best-in-class products and production for a more sustainable future. Fast A Digital Enterprise enables to speed up product development and to make production faster, more adaptive, and more efficient. Adaptive Being a Digital Enterprise allows industrial companies to quickly adapt to changes in customer preferences, market trends, and technological advancements. Sustainable A Digital Enterprise can use resources more efficiently and drive sustainable operations. It strengthens its resilience through intelligent and adaptive manufacturing systems. Take your business to the next level We enable industrial companies to transform and evolve their businesses into a Digital Enterprise by seamlessly combining the real and digital worlds with our integrated software and automation offerings. all Speed up and improve product development Our leading industrial software portfolio allows you to design, simulate, test, optimize, and validate products using a comprehensive Digital Twin. By connecting multiple domains, we are enabling interdisciplinary collaboration. all Make production faster, adaptive, and more efficient With our leading industrial automation portfolio, you can increase productivity through well-automated production. You can also transform your automated production into adaptive production by integrating IT and OT. all Connect everything with a consistent data flow Unleash the power of data and integrate the product and production lifecycles, and supply chains in a fully digital way, based on open, interoperable interfaces to continuously optimize product, production and operations. all Industrial AI Industrial customers are ready to scale AI for real impact. Industrial AI makes this possible – built for the real world, where reliability, security, and scalability matter. Learn more all Comprehensive Digital Twin Our unique Digital Twin approach enables you to plan, simulate, predict and optimize products, production processes, machines, and entire plants in the digital world before taking action in the real world. Learn more all Software-Defined Systems Utilizing proven IT mechanisms – such as decoupling functions from specific hardware - systems can be expanded via software and centrally managed as needed, enabling agility and continuous evolution from product to production. Learn more CPG industry Smarter from data to value CPG companies must handle rising demands for personalized, sustainable products while dealing with volatile markets and strict regulations. The answer to this complexity is to unlock the power of data by becoming a Digital Enterprise. Watch the Hannover Messe 2026 keynote and discover how the comprehensive Digital Twin, Industrial AI and Software-Defined Systems can help you get faster from idea to consumer! Read the blog article Our customers Find inspiration in our customers’ success stories Case study all Pringles Poland Once a fully automated Pringles factory, it has now evolved into a Digital Enterprise. Powered by Digital Twins and AI, it turns production data into deeper process insights and drives the next wave of innovation. Case study all Audi AG Germany Audi moved beyond flawless automation to software-defined systems, Industrial AI, and scalable virtualization, creating adaptive production that redefines flexibility and pushes automotive manufacturing past its limits. Case study all Spinnova Finland Spinnova has developed a unique technology to produce environmentally friendly fibers with minimal CO₂ emissions and water use. This enables customers to produce cotton-like fibers from a variety of cellulosic raw materials. Case study all Siemens Electronics Factory Erlangen Germany The factory is a Digital Enterprise that is fit for the future. It combines state-of-the-art production with the latest technologies like the Digital Twin, Artificial Intelligence, IT/OT convergence, and the Industrial Metaverse. Digital Threads In a Digital Enterprise, Digital Threads refer to the interconnected and integrated flow of data throughout the entire product and production lifecycle. The Digital Threads support companies of all sizes and industries to simplify and accelerate their transformation. They provide step-by-step guidance to ensure a faster, more efficient path to success. Learn more Explore our Digital Enterprise resources Story all Time travel with the Digital Twin Discover how the Digital Twin uses historical and live data to mirror current conditions and predict future scenarios with confidence. Companies can leverage simulations to remain competitive through managing industry challenges. Blog all How the Digital Enterprise Unlocks Data in CPG The blog shows how a Digital Enterprise is breaking down data silos in the consumer packaged goods (CPG) industry. AI and edge computing are making production more flexible, sustainable, and efficient – from design to logistics. Blog all The core technologies that build a Digital Enterprise Learn how the synthesis of Digital Twin, Software-Defined Systems, and Industrial AI can transform the way companies design and produce products, gather data, and use resources to become fast, adaptive and sustainable. Open platform all Siemens Xcelerator Siemens Xcelerator is an open digital business platform and ecosystem designed to accelerate digital transformation, featuring a curated portfolio of integrated hardware/software, a partner network, and a marketplace. Topic all Industrial Metaverse Transforming into a Digital Enterprise creates an interconnected ecosystem, in the Industrial Metaverse. It offers a "single pane of glass" for real-time data, physics-based simulations, and AI, optimizing operations performance. Blog all Maximum data intelligence AI transforms complex info into actionable insights by linking diverse data. A single data fabric enhances this cross-domain intelligence, ensuring all enterprise data is accessible, trusted, and context-rich. Get your journey started Contact us
